rules:
When you activate this Feature, you may pick another Feature on its Dropsite and roll a dice. On a result of a 3+, remove that Feature and any Battalions deployed on it from this Dropsite. If any Battalions are removed due to this rule, roll a dice. On a result of a 5+, this feature remains in play, otherwise, it is removed.
This feature only requires 3 or more Battalions to be removed during Battalion Combat and 3 damage to remove due to attacks.
